title: Yijing Hexagram 25: Wu Wang (Innocence)
description: Hexagram 25 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 25 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Innocence. Supreme success. Perseverance furthers. If someone is not as he should be, he has misfortune.
